task1.title: The amount of waste production
task1.instruction: The table below shows the amount of waste production (in millions of tonnes) in six different countries over a twenty-year period. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: In many countries, shops open for longer hours daily every week. What are the negative or positive effects of this on the shoppers and the local community?
